name: Quasar
description: A Hyperion singularity grenade that always comes in shock and secretly carries a singularity effect even when the card does not show it. It has one of the strongest pulls and widest effective areas in its class, making it a top-tier crowd control tool. Its raw damage is lower than a comparable purple shock singularity, but it makes up for that with a bigger shock field, a stronger pull, and an extremely short fuse.
notes:
Kills from the pull, the shock field, or the final blast all count toward the Singled Out challenge.

Gaige can push its shock performance higher with Wires Don't Talk, and Electrical Burn adds a chance to apply burning damage over time. The red text references the mass-energy equivalence formula, `E = mc^2`.

special.description: Creates a singularity that drags in nearby enemies, then emits continuous shock damage in the area until it detonates.
special.title: The thunder shall bring forth the pain!
